data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md exists - Verify: test -f .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md
- [ ] File contains 10 incident entries - Verify: grep -c '^### INC-' .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
- [ ] Smoke test exists and is executable - Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-known-issues-smoke.sh
- [ ] Smoke test passes - Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-known-issues-smoke.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry exists - Verify: grep -q '.claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md' .test-index
